description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a sleeveless hoodie with a visible drawstring and a printed design on the back. He wears fitted pants with a knee pad on the right leg and a utility belt, suggesting a practical or streetwise style. His footwear consists of sturdy, high-ankle boots suitable for walking on various urban surfaces. The individual also sports a beanie hat, adding to the casual, streetwear look. His arms are extended horizontally, and his hands are open, revealing no carried objects. The overall appearance is that of a modern city dweller, ready for everyday activities in an urban environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian in a sleeveless hoodie, fitted pants with a knee pad, boots, and a beanie hat, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sleeveless hoodie, beanie hat, utility belt, and knee pad on the right leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the beanie, the sleeveless cut of the hoodie, and the boot's shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the printed design on the back of the hoodie and the fit of the pants and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the knee pad detail, the side of the beanie, and the overall silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless hoodie, fitted pants with knee pad, utility belt, beanie hat
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
